name: Low-Fat Crab Chowder
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel, dice and cook potatoes, set aside.
2. Melt margarine in a 6 quart pan over medium heat.
3. Add onion and green pepper, cook about 4 minutes, stirring frequently.
4. Add flour, cook about 1 minute, stirring constantly.
5. Gradually add milk using a whisk to prevent lumps and blend the sauce.
6. Add corn, salt, thyme, and pepper.
7. Reduce heat to low and cook until the mixture is hot but not bubbling.
8. Cut crab into bite-size pieces and add to the sauce.
9. Add potatoes. Heat again until hot but not bubbling, stirring frequently.
10. Just before serving, add cooking sherry.
